TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tademaw-Jay_Chou, title = tademaw-Jay_Chou, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tademaw-Jay_Chou} }

S.FORM: tademaw-Jay Chou Jay Chou u siwkay niza Jay Chou (1979.1.18) nalecuhan i Taywan. balaki i Taywan Sinpei se Linko chu, u saydang ku wama, pasubana' ku mauzipay. wina sa, u saydang tu, pasubana ku nalimaan. uy adidi' henay, miliyas tu ku wama atu ina. i wawa henay ciniza, manamuh tu ku sadadiw. zumasatu manah mitudung ku mudadiw a palaway. tulu a mihca, minanam tu ku piano. manamuh tu misalama' tu kanas-mali. sakamu sa ciniza, numicudad henay ciniza, malawilaw ci Chang Sueyu, Hong Kong "sasepat tapuku a hongti" ilabu'ay a cacay. manamuh ciniza tu Chang Sheyuan. zumasa, ci Lisuchuan atu ci Setifu Wangdel malawilaw tu cinizaan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Śú®2000ŚĻī, "Jay", . Jay Chou (traditional Chinese: ŚĎ®śĚįŚÄę; simplified Chinese: ŚĎ®śĚįšľ¶; pinyin: ZhŇću Ji√©l√ļn; born 18 January 1979) is a Taiwanese musician, singer, songwriter, record producer, film producer, actor and director. In 2000, Chou released his debut album, titled Jay (2000), under the record company Alfa Music. Since then his music has gained recognition throughout Asia, most notably in regions such as Taiwan, Mainland China, Hong Kong, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Korea, Japan and in the Asian communities of Western countries such as the United States and Australia. He has sold more than 30 million albums and has received numerous awards for his musical works. Chou has also written songs for other artists whilst working on his albums. In 2003, he was the cover story of Time magazine (Asia version), titled New King of Asian Pop, acknowledging his influence on popular culture. He has since held six world tours, performing in cities around the world to more than 10 million people. u nalimaan niza Jay(2000 a mihcan) Fantesi(2001 a mihcan) waluay a salaedan(2002 a mihcan) Yehuimei(2003 a mihcan) datay(2004 a mihcan) 11a bulad a Siupang(2005 a mihcan) ahinin ci Fantesi(2006 a mihcan) inayi' ku lawad kaku(2007 a mihcan) Mociecuo(2008 a mihcan) milakuit tu mihcaan(2010 a mihcan) maceku'ay a bacu(2011 a mihcan) 12 baluhayay a nalimaan(2012 a mihcan) aya,kapah tu(2014 a mihcan) iayaw mabiay a kungku nu Jay Chou(2016 a mihcan) pataayaw 2018 a mihcan patahkalay a balud (2018 a mihcan) u kawlah niza sakacacay a dadiw-balud, maala ku Taywan Cinciu kawlah sakapahay a dadiw-balud. zumasatu maala Taywan kya mihcan sakapahay kalulikitan dadiw mudadiw a balud, sakapahay misanga'ay atu sakapahay a sadadiw. maala aca ku Sinkapol Cinciu kawlah sakapahay baluhayay a mudadiway. sakatusa a dadiw-balud "Fantesi", maala sakapahay a dadiw-balud, sakapahay mitulik-dadiw, atu lima a kawlah nu Cinciu kawlah. nazikuzay tulu a mihcan sa, palamadac ciniza. uyzasa saka "semilaway balu a ceci" atu" u sanek nu tipus" uyniyan tatusa a dadiw maala tusa a mihcan a sakapahay a dadiw nu mihcaan. saka20 atu saka22 Cinciu a kawlah, maala sakapahay a dadiw-balud atu sakapahay Hulam a kamu tatama mudadiway a kawlah. i 2002 a mihcan katukuh 2006 a mihcan sa, lalid sa maala lima Hong Kong IFPI sakapahay pacakay Hulam a kamu CD a kawlah. maala Hong Kong Cecayuetan sakamanamuhay a Taywan mudadiway 2001 a mihcan, maala aca ku Hong Kong Cecayuetan sakamanamuhay a Taywan mudadiway "Jay", "Fantesi", "Yehuimei", "milakuit tu mihcaan" maala Cinciu a kawlah sakapahay Hulam a kamu dadiw-balud a kawlah. 2004,2006,2007,2008 sepat a mihcan, maala kitakit sadadiw tabakiaya a kawlah " Yaco satalakaw pacakayay a palaway"
S.PHON: tad…ômaw-*aj ¶ńßou *aj ¶ńßou u siwkaj niza *aj ¶ńßou (****.*.**) nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan. bar~…ĺaki i tajwan sinp…ôi s…ô r~…ĺinko ¶ńßu, u sajdaŇč ku wama, pasubana Ē~ ° ku mauzipaj. wina sa, u sajdaŇč tu, pasubana ku nar~…ĺimaan. uj adidi Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj, mir~…ĺijas tu ku wama atu ina. i wawa ńß…ônaj ¶iniza, manamuńß tu ku sadadiw. zumasatu manańß mituduŇč ku mudadiw a par~…ĺawaj. tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶a, minanam tu ku piano. manamuńß tu misar~…ĺama Ē~ ° tu kanas-mar~…ĺi. sakamu sa ¶iniza, numi ¶udad ńß…ônaj ¶iniza, mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw ¶i ¶ńßaŇč su…ôu, ńßoŇč koŇč "sas…ôpat tapuku a ńßoŇčti" ir~…ĺabu Ē~ °aj a ¶a ¶aj. manamuńß ¶iniza tu ¶ńßaŇč sńß…ôuan. zumasa, ¶i r~…ĺisu ¶ńßuan atu ¶i s…ôtifu waŇčd…ôr~…ĺ mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tu ¶inizaan. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ******, "*aj", . *aj ¶ńßou (traditionar~…ĺ ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; simpr~…ĺifi…ôd ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: zńß*u *i*r~…ĺ*n; born ** *anuarj ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô musi ¶ian, siŇč…ôr, soŇčwrit…ôr, r…ô ¶ord produ ¶…ôr, fir~…ĺm produ ¶…ôr, a ¶tor and dir…ô ¶tor. in ****, ¶ńßou r…ôr~…ĺ…ôas…ôd ńßis d…ôbut ar~…ĺbum, titr~…ĺ…ôd *aj (****), und…ôr tńß…ô r…ô ¶ord ¶ompanj ar~…ĺfa musi ¶. sin ¶…ô tńß…ôn ńßis musi ¶ ńßas gain…ôd r…ô ¶ognition tńßrougńßout asia, most notabr~…ĺj in r…ôgions su ¶ńß as taiwan, mainr~…ĺand ¶ńßina, ńßoŇč koŇč, tńßair~…ĺand, siŇčapor…ô, mar~…ĺajsia, indon…ôsia, kor…ôa, *apan and in tńß…ô asian ¶ommuniti…ôs of w…ôst…ôrn ¶ountri…ôs su ¶ńß as tńß…ô unit…ôd stat…ôs and austrar~…ĺia. ńß…ô ńßas sor~…ĺd mor…ô tńßan ** mir~…ĺr~…ĺion ar~…ĺbums and ńßas r…ô ¶…ôi*…ôd num…ôrous awards for ńßis musi ¶ar~…ĺ works. ¶ńßou ńßas ar~…ĺso writt…ôn soŇčs for otńß…ôr artists wńßir~…ĺst workiŇč on ńßis ar~…ĺbums. in ****, ńß…ô was tńß…ô ¶o*…ôr storj of tim…ô magazin…ô (asia *…ôrsion), titr~…ĺ…ôd n…ôw kiŇč of asian pop, a ¶knowr~…ĺ…ôdgiŇč ńßis infr~…ĺu…ôn ¶…ô on popur~…ĺar ¶ur~…ĺtur…ô. ńß…ô ńßas sin ¶…ô ńß…ôr~…ĺd si* worr~…ĺd tours, p…ôrformiŇč in ¶iti…ôs around tńß…ô worr~…ĺd to mor…ô tńßan ** mir~…ĺr~…ĺion p…ôopr~…ĺ…ô. u nar~…ĺimaan niza *aj(**** a mińß ¶an) fant…ôsi(**** a mińß ¶an) war~…ĺuaj a sar~…ĺa…ôdan(**** a mińß ¶an) j…ôńßuim…ôi(**** a mińß ¶an) dataj(**** a mińß ¶an) **a bur~…ĺad a siupaŇč(**** a mińß ¶an) ańßinin ¶i fant…ôsi(**** a mińß ¶an) inaji Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺawad kaku(**** a mińß ¶an) mo ¶i…ô ¶uo(**** a mińß ¶an) mir~…ĺakuit tu mińß ¶aan(**** a mińß ¶an) ma ¶…ôku Ē~ °aj a ba ¶u(**** a mińß ¶an) ** bar~…ĺuńßajaj a nar~…ĺimaan(**** a mińß ¶an) aja,kapańß tu(**** a mińß ¶an) iajaw mabiaj a kuŇčku nu *aj ¶ńßou(**** a mińß ¶an) pataajaw **** a mińß ¶an patańßkar~…ĺaj a bar~…ĺud (**** a mińß ¶an) u kawr~…ĺańß niza saka ¶a ¶aj a dadiw-bar~…ĺud, maar~…ĺa ku tajwan ¶in ¶iu kawr~…ĺańß sakapańßaj a dadiw-bar~…ĺud. zumasatu maar~…ĺa tajwan kja mińß ¶an sakapańßaj kar~…ĺur~…ĺikitan dadiw mudadiw a bar~…ĺud, sakapańßaj misaŇča Ē~ °aj atu sakapańßaj a sadadiw. maar~…ĺa a ¶a ku sinkapor~…ĺ ¶in ¶iu kawr~…ĺańß sakapańßaj bar~…ĺuńßajaj a mudadiwaj. sakatusa a dadiw-bar~…ĺud "fant…ôsi", maar~…ĺa sakapańßaj a dadiw-bar~…ĺud, sakapańßaj mitur~…ĺik-dadiw, atu r~…ĺima a kawr~…ĺańß nu ¶in ¶iu kawr~…ĺańß. nazikuzaj tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶an sa, par~…ĺamada ¶ ¶iniza. ujzasa saka "s…ômir~…ĺawaj bar~…ĺu a ¶…ô ¶i" atu" u san…ôk nu tipus" ujnijan tatusa a dadiw maar~…ĺa tusa a mińß ¶an a sakapańßaj a dadiw nu mińß ¶aan. saka** atu saka** ¶in ¶iu a kawr~…ĺańß, maar~…ĺa sakapańßaj a dadiw-bar~…ĺud atu sakapańßaj ńßur~…ĺam a kamu tatama mudadiwaj a kawr~…ĺańß. i **** a mińß ¶an katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an sa, r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa maar~…ĺa r~…ĺima ńßoŇč koŇč ifpi sakapańßaj pa ¶akaj ńßur~…ĺam a kamu ¶d a kawr~…ĺańß. maar~…ĺa ńßoŇč koŇč ¶…ô ¶aju…ôtan sakamanamuńßaj a tajwan mudadiwaj **** a mińß ¶an, maar~…ĺa a ¶a ku ńßoŇč koŇč ¶…ô ¶aju…ôtan sakamanamuńßaj a tajwan mudadiwaj "*aj", "fant…ôsi", "j…ôńßuim…ôi", "mir~…ĺakuit tu mińß ¶aan" maar~…ĺa ¶in ¶iu a kawr~…ĺańß sakapańßaj ńßur~…ĺam a kamu dadiw-bar~…ĺud a kawr~…ĺańß. ****,****,****,**** s…ôpat a mińß ¶an, maar~…ĺa kitakit sadadiw tabakiaja a kawr~…ĺańß " ja ¶o satar~…ĺakaw pa ¶akajaj a par~…ĺawaj"
S.FORM: tademaw-Jay Chou Jay Chou u siwkay niza Jay Chou (1979.1.18) nalecuhan i Taywan. balaki i Taywan Sinpei se Linko chu, u saydang ku wama, pasubana' ku mauzipay. wina sa, u saydang tu, pasubana ku nalimaan. uy adidi' henay, miliyas tu ku wama atu ina. i wawa henay ciniza, manamuh tu ku sadadiw. zumasatu manah mitudung ku mudadiw a palaway. tulu a mihca, minanam tu ku piano. manamuh tu misalama' tu kanas-mali. sakamu sa ciniza, numicudad henay ciniza, malawilaw ci Chang Sueyu, Hong Kong "sasepat tapuku a hongti" ilabu'ay a cacay. manamuh ciniza tu Chang Sheyuan. zumasa, ci Lisuchuan atu ci Setifu Wangdel malawilaw tu cinizaan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Śú®2000ŚĻī, "Jay", . Jay Chou (traditional Chinese: ŚĎ®śĚįŚÄę; simplified Chinese: ŚĎ®śĚįšľ¶; pinyin: ZhŇću Ji√©l√ļn; born 18 January 1979) is a Taiwanese musician, singer, songwriter, record producer, film producer, actor and director. In 2000, Chou released his debut album, titled Jay (2000), under the record company Alfa Music. Since then his music has gained recognition throughout Asia, most notably in regions such as Taiwan, Mainland China, Hong Kong, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Korea, Japan and in the Asian communities of Western countries such as the United States and Australia. He has sold more than 30 million albums and has received numerous awards for his musical works. Chou has also written songs for other artists whilst working on his albums. In 2003, he was the cover story of Time magazine (Asia version), titled New King of Asian Pop, acknowledging his influence on popular culture. He has since held six world tours, performing in cities around the world to more than 10 million people. u nalimaan niza Jay(2000 a mihcan) Fantesi(2001 a mihcan) waluay a salaedan(2002 a mihcan) Yehuimei(2003 a mihcan) datay(2004 a mihcan) 11a bulad a Siupang(2005 a mihcan) ahinin ci Fantesi(2006 a mihcan) inayi' ku lawad kaku(2007 a mihcan) Mociecuo(2008 a mihcan) milakuit tu mihcaan(2010 a mihcan) maceku'ay a bacu(2011 a mihcan) 12 baluhayay a nalimaan(2012 a mihcan) aya,kapah tu(2014 a mihcan) iayaw mabiay a kungku nu Jay Chou(2016 a mihcan) pataayaw 2018 a mihcan patahkalay a balud (2018 a mihcan) u kawlah niza sakacacay a dadiw-balud, maala ku Taywan Cinciu kawlah sakapahay a dadiw-balud. zumasatu maala Taywan kya mihcan sakapahay kalulikitan dadiw mudadiw a balud, sakapahay misanga'ay atu sakapahay a sadadiw. maala aca ku Sinkapol Cinciu kawlah sakapahay baluhayay a mudadiway. sakatusa a dadiw-balud "Fantesi", maala sakapahay a dadiw-balud, sakapahay mitulik-dadiw, atu lima a kawlah nu Cinciu kawlah. nazikuzay tulu a mihcan sa, palamadac ciniza. uyzasa saka "semilaway balu a ceci" atu" u sanek nu tipus" uyniyan tatusa a dadiw maala tusa a mihcan a sakapahay a dadiw nu mihcaan. saka20 atu saka22 Cinciu a kawlah, maala sakapahay a dadiw-balud atu sakapahay Hulam a kamu tatama mudadiway a kawlah. i 2002 a mihcan katukuh 2006 a mihcan sa, lalid sa maala lima Hong Kong IFPI sakapahay pacakay Hulam a kamu CD a kawlah. maala Hong Kong Cecayuetan sakamanamuhay a Taywan mudadiway 2001 a mihcan, maala aca ku Hong Kong Cecayuetan sakamanamuhay a Taywan mudadiway "Jay", "Fantesi", "Yehuimei", "milakuit tu mihcaan" maala Cinciu a kawlah sakapahay Hulam a kamu dadiw-balud a kawlah. 2004,2006,2007,2008 sepat a mihcan, maala kitakit sadadiw tabakiaya a kawlah " Yaco satalakaw pacakayay a palaway"

mińß ¶a, minanam tu ku piano. manamuńß tu misar~…ĺama Ē~ ° tu kanas-mar~…ĺi. sakamu sa ¶iniza, numi ¶udad ńß…ônaj ¶iniza, mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw ¶i ¶ńßaŇč su…ôu, ńßoŇč koŇč "sas…ôpat tapuku a ńßoŇčti"
